title: Homepage hero heading and supporting copy render on first load
description: Verifies the landing page communicates the core value proposition immediately.

steps.description: Verify text "Build the future on Hedera" is visible
Verify text "tooling for building trusted Hedera apps" is visible

title: Header brand and primary navigation are visible on the landing page
description: Verifies the fixed header exposes brand identity and the main navigational destinations.

title: Unauthenticated header shows the Connect action
description: Verifies a visitor without a wallet session is offered the connect entry point.

title: Connect dialog opens from the header
description: Verifies the connect-wallet surface opens and renders its main structure.

title: Connect dialog exposes both installed and unavailable wallet groups
description: Verifies the wallet chooser surfaces the two distinct availability groups instead of rendering a blank dialog.

title: Homepage demo tabs are visible below the hero section
description: Verifies the interactive code sample area is present and ready for exploration.

title: Mirror SDK demo tab shows MirrorNodeClient sample content
description: Verifies switching to the mirror demo exposes the public mirror package API surface.

title: Wallet SDK demo tab shows createWallet sample content
description: Verifies switching to the wallet demo exposes the public wallet package API surface.

title: Realtime SDK demo tab switches to the subscribe sample panel
description: Verifies the realtime demo tab change is hydrated and renders the realtime sample panel before any deeper code assertions.

title: Header Ecosystem link navigates to the ecosystem page
description: Verifies the landing-page header route to the ecosystem content works.

title: Header Showcase link navigates to the showcase index
description: Verifies the landing-page header route to the showcase works.

title: Showcase index renders core discovery controls
description: Verifies the main showcase surface loads with search, filter, and discovery structure.

steps.description: Verify the field with placeholder "Search..." is visible
Verify element "Filter Use Cases" is visible

title: Prefilled showcase wallet query remains hydrated after client rendering
description: Verifies a deep-linked wallet search survives hydration and keeps the route-backed input consistent.

steps.description: Verify the field with placeholder "Search..." contains the value "wallet"

title: Prefilled showcase query hydrates the search input
description: Verifies deep-linked search state is reflected back into the controlled input.

steps.description: Verify the field with placeholder "Search..." contains the value "wallet"

title: Deep-linked rare search query shows the empty-state copy
description: Verifies a no-results showcase query is stable after SSR and hydration when loaded directly from the URL.

steps.description: Verify the field with placeholder "Search..." contains the value "zzzzzz-nonexistent-project"
Verify text "No public projects match the current filters." is visible

title: Clearing a deep-linked no-results search restores the standard showcase view
description: Verifies recovery from a prefilled no-results query starts from a hydrated state before clearing the search field.

steps.description: Verify text "No public projects match the current filters." is visible

title: Package filter popover opens from the showcase index
description: Verifies package filtering controls are discoverable and populated.

title: Deep-linked Hieco Wallet package filter remains stable after hydration
description: Verifies the package-filter URL state is honored without depending on flaky custom-checkbox interaction.

title: Use-case filter popover opens from the showcase index
description: Verifies use-case filtering controls are discoverable and populated.

title: Deep-linked Developer Tools use-case filter remains stable after hydration
description: Verifies use-case filter state is honored from the URL without depending on flaky custom-checkbox interaction.

title: Deep-linked Open Source showcase state remains stable after hydration
description: Verifies the boolean open-source filter survives direct URL loading and hydration.

title: Package and use-case deep links can coexist in showcase URL state
description: Verifies both filter dimensions survive SSR and hydration together when loaded directly from the URL.

title: Search query and Open Source deep links can coexist in showcase URL state
description: Verifies text search and boolean filter state are preserved together from the initial URL.

steps.description: Verify the field with placeholder "Search..." contains the value "wallet"

title: Search query and package deep links remain stable in showcase URL state
description: Verifies text search and package-filter state survive direct loading together without interactive typing or checkbox clicks.

steps.description: Verify the field with placeholder "Search..." contains the value "wallet"

title: Unauthenticated showcase surface still exposes the Submit Yours entry point
description: Verifies the page keeps the submission affordance visible while the wallet remains disconnected.

title: Missing showcase slug renders the not-found state
description: Verifies a nonexistent showcase project slug returns a clear not-found response.

steps.description: Verify text "Project not found." is visible
Verify element "Back to Showcase" is visible

title: Back to Showcase returns from the not-found state to the index
description: Verifies the recovery path from a missing project works.

title: Direct not-found route card from TestSprite Lab opens the missing-project page
description: Verifies the harness route card for the missing-project regression path still works.

steps.description: Verify text "Project not found." is visible

title: A visible showcase project card opens its detail page
description: Verifies the approved-project listing navigates into an individual project detail route.

description: Verifies the project detail route renders package metadata for the selected project.

description: Verifies the project detail route renders use-case metadata for the selected project.

steps.description: Click on the first visible project card

title: Project detail page exposes the Project Details section
description: Verifies the project detail route renders the stable project metadata block.

title: Project detail page shows owner metadata and the Visit Project CTA
description: Verifies the detail route surfaces both core metadata and the primary outbound call to action.

description: Verifies the ecosystem route renders the high-level overview and introductory framing.

description: Verifies the first major explanatory section is present.

description: Verifies the concise summary section is present at the end of the article.

title: TestSprite Lab loads the primary routes and harness sections
description: Verifies the deterministic QA surface itself is present and navigable.

title: Landing page route card from TestSprite Lab navigates to the homepage
description: Verifies the harness can launch the main landing route directly.

steps.description: Verify text "Build the future on Hedera" is visible

title: Showcase index route card from TestSprite Lab navigates to the showcase page
description: Verifies the harness can launch the showcase route directly.

title: Blank project ID wallet scenario keeps WalletConnect disabled
description: Verifies the wallet harness does not enable WalletConnect when the project ID is blank or whitespace only.

steps.description: Click on "Blank project ID disables WalletConnect"

title: Configured project ID wallet scenario enables WalletConnect
description: Verifies the wallet harness enables WalletConnect when a configured project ID is selected.

steps.description: Click on "Configured project ID enables WalletConnect"

title: Mixed wallet availability scenario shows HashPack as connectable and Kabila as unavailable
description: Verifies the wallet harness distinguishes connectable and unavailable wallets correctly.

steps.description: Click on "Mixed installed and unavailable wallets"

title: SDK retryable-network scenario shows the deterministic classification details
description: Verifies the SDK harness exposes the retryable-network scenario outputs without live network calls.

title: SDK configuration scenario shows invalid-operator details and hint text
description: Verifies the SDK harness exposes the deterministic configuration-validation scenario outputs.

steps.description: Verify text "Use the format shard.realm.num" is visible

title: SDK unwrap scenario shows the ready result and thrown invalid-operator message
description: Verifies the unwrap-on-error path surfaces deterministic failure details for regression coverage.

steps.description: Verify text "Invalid operator account id: not-an-id" is visible

title: Invalid entity ID plus missing custom network shows both validation failures
description: Verifies the utilities harness exposes both invalid entity-state and missing-network errors together.

steps.description: Type "not-an-entity" into the field labeled "Entity ID"
Verify text "Invalid Hedera entity ID" is visible
Verify text "Unknown custom network \"missing\"" is visible

title: Configured custom network lookup resolves the demo mirror URL
description: Verifies the utilities harness resolves the configured demo network path correctly.

title: Mirror override URL is reflected in derived client configuration
description: Verifies the mirror harness reflects an explicit override without making a live request.

steps.description: Fill "https://example.com/mirror" into the field labeled "Override base URL"

title: Realtime pre-connect guard reports zero pool state and Pool not initialized
description: Verifies the realtime harness fails fast before any relay connection exists.

steps.description: Verify text "Pool states before connect" is visible
Verify text "Pool not initialized" is visible
